name: dirong-discord-record-bot
description: Dirong Discord recording and STT pipeline

scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.test: node --no-warnings --test dist/config.test.js dist/i18n/catalog.test.js dist/settings/env-readers.test.js dist/settings/env-settings-loader.test.js dist/settings/dirong-user-data.test.js dist/settings/local-settings-store.test.js dist/settings/local-secret-store.test.js dist/settings/product-settings.test.js dist/setup/wizard-service.test.js dist/cli/arg-parser.test.js dist/notion/settings.test.js dist/notion/target.test.js dist/notion/schema.test.js dist/notion/schema-presets.test.js dist/notion/client.test.js dist/notion/page-properties.test.js dist/notion/property-rules.test.js dist/notion/registry-store.test.js dist/notion/managed-schema.test.js dist/notion/schema-manager.test.js dist/notion/blocks.test.js dist/notion/content-hash.test.js dist/notion/write-store.test.js dist/notion/writer.test.js dist/notion/automation-service.test.js dist/process/run-child.test.js dist/runtime/polling-loop.test.js dist/app/doctor.test.js dist/app/phase3-stt-cli.test.js dist/app/phase4-ai-cleanup-cli.test.js dist/app/phase5-notion-upload-cli.test.js dist/app/session-purge-cli.test.js dist/app/sqlite-backup.test.js dist/ai/cleanup/claude-persistent-cli-provider.test.js dist/ai/cleanup/claude-persistent-smoke.test.js dist/ai/cleanup/provider-lifecycle.test.js dist/ai/cleanup/provider-lifecycle-service.test.js dist/ai/cleanup/automation-service.test.js dist/ai/cleanup/draft.test.js dist/ai/cleanup/markdown-renderer.test.js dist/ai/cleanup/runner.test.js dist/dashboard/server.test.js dist/recording/alone-finalize-state.test.js dist/recording/alone-finalize-service.test.js dist/storage/dashboard-read-model.test.js dist/storage/file-retention.test.js dist/storage/migrations.test.js dist/storage/schema-consistency.test.js dist/storage/session-purge.test.js dist/storage/session-store-ai-cleanup.test.js dist/storage/session-store-paths.test.js dist/stt/automation-service.test.js dist/stt/provider-factory.test.js dist/transcript/timeline.test.js
